safetyTasks.name: Cold Storage Temperature
safetyTasks.description: All refrigeration units must be between 1°C and 4°C.

safetyTasks.name: Hot Holding Temperature
safetyTasks.description: Hot food must be held at 60°C or above before service.

safetyTasks.name: Hand Hygiene Station Check
safetyTasks.description: All stations must be stocked with soap and sanitizer.

safetyTasks.name: Pest Control Inspection
safetyTasks.description: Monthly inspection by licensed pest control provider.

safetyTasks.name: Cross-Contamination Protocol
safetyTasks.description: Allergen separation procedures must be followed at all times.

safetyTasks.name: Supplier Delivery Inspection
safetyTasks.description: Incoming goods must be checked for temperature and labelling.

safetyChecks.desc: All refrigeration units must be between 1°C and 4°C.
Hot food must be held at 60°C or above before service.
All stations must be stocked with soap and sanitizer.
Monthly inspection by licensed pest control provider.
Allergen separation procedures must be followed at all times.
Incoming goods must be checked for temperature and labelling.
